tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 東門之池，可以漚麻。彼美淑姬，可與晤歌。 東門之池，可以漚紵。彼美淑姬，可與晤語。 東門之池，可以漚菅。彼美淑姬，可與晤言。

1 The moat at the east gate Is fit to steep hemp in. That beautiful, virtuous, lady Can respond to you in songs.
2 The moat at the east gate Is fit to steep the boehmeria in. That beautiful, virtuous, lady Can respond to you in discourse
3 The moat at the east gate Is fit to steep the rope-rush in. That beautiful, virtuous lady Can respond to you in conversation.
